title: Build authentication module
description: Create a Supabase Auth integration with email/password login, session management, and RLS policies for user-scoped data access.

title: Write API documentation
description: Generate OpenAPI spec for all 7 Edge Functions. Document every action, its parameters, response shapes, and error codes.

title: Integration test suite
description: Write comprehensive integration tests that verify the authentication module works end-to-end with the Edge Functions.
